name: yc-company-leads
description: Search YC's public company directory through the same Algolia index used by the website, then optionally enrich each company from its public YC profile page.

inputs.name: query
inputs.note: Search query such as 'ai agents', 'healthcare', or 'property management'.

inputs.name: enrich
inputs.note: Fetch individual public company pages for founders and social links.

auth.note: Uses public YC directory data and YC's public client-side Algolia search key.

verification_result: Algolia returned 858 matching public company records for 'ai agents'; verified 10 JSON rows and 10 CSV rows with optional enrichment.
known_risks: YC's public client-side Algolia key or index names may change.
Enrichment fetches one public company profile page per result; keep limits reasonable.
This artifact intentionally does not scrape private emails or phone numbers.
